title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. gutierrezii
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. gutierrezii, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. gutierrezii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
